spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates spring hover zoom in an e-commerce grid and compares it to scale transform.

interactive.rationale: Hover and focus-within states are fully operational on product cards.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Directly aligns with the milestone description demonstrating spring-animated e-commerce cards.

edge_cases.rationale: Includes fallback warnings and directly highlights the difference in physical displacement.

references.rationale: Includes required ChromeStatus link and MDN references.

design_system.rationale: Adheres to CSS variable rules and pairs background/color changes appropriately on hover.

summary: A clean and practical e-commerce product card grid concept utilizing spring zoom hover physics and comparing it with scale fallback.
